name: Lúth-Coralpath
personality: A luminous propeller-hatted snail with ◉ bullseye eyes that spin as fast as its ideas. Lúth-Coralpath treats your production environment like a sketchpad and your architecture like a suggestion — wisdom is a stat it considers aspirational.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
